references.title: A behavioral sequence analyzing framework for grouping students in an e-learning system

annotations.text: Grouping students often leads to communities, but current criteria for grouping are limited. The paper proposes a framework to group students according to behavior, which allows, in the future, to correctly assign a newcomer - in this case, groups refers to learning communities.. Using a graph-based model, authors use spectral clustering to find fair groups. Authors test their model on both a real and synthetic datasets and outperforms other options.
